Yonex

VCORE Plus

ControlElongatedUSAP approved2024Beginner

2024 elongated control paddle from Yonex, with a 15mm core.

$200

Street price as of July 2026 — retailers move it.

Search Yonex — Yonex VCORE Plus (opens in new tab)

This link goes straight to the brand's own site — we don't earn a commission from it today. If that changes, we'll say so right here and on our disclosure page.

Measured performance.

Where this paddle sits against the 514 we track. We describe the band it lands in rather than publishing the underlying lab figures — those are licensed, and the bands are the part we can share.

ControlHighUpper range

Touch and placement — the trade-off against raw power.

Spin and power aren't shown here: this paddle hasn't been through the bench those two bands come from, and 156 of the 514 haven't. What's above is measured; nothing is estimated.

Full specifications

BrandYonex
Released2024
Tournament approvalUSAP
ShapeElongated
Core thickness15 mm
Static weight7.9 oz
Grip length5 in
Grip circumference4.25 in
Best forBeginner

Where to go from here.

Same play style, a different trade-off — one steps up the measured performance, one protects your wallet.

Top pick

Prokennex Black Ace 16

$279 +$79 vs this

The step up in this play style: a near-identical spec profile. Widebody shape, 16mm core.

See this paddle →
Value pick

Chorus Shapeshifter EX

$175 −$25 vs this

Keeps the control character for less: aimed at intermediates. Same elongated shape, 16mm core.

Similar paddles.

Independent court data — no ads, no pay-to-list, no sponsored listings. Some paddle & gear links may be affiliate links, disclosed at each one. Paddle specs from the manufacturer; performance bands from our own catalog ranking. Updated July 2026.
